title: Cliproot Local Configuration
description: Schema for the .cliproot/config.json file that configures a local ClipRoot repository.

protocolVersion.description: CRP protocol version used by this repository (e.g., "0.0.3").

currentProjectId.description: The active project ID for this repository.

remotes.description: Named registry remotes. Keys are remote names (e.g., "origin").

url.description: Registry base URL. The client appends /v1/index/config.json to discover the registry.

owner.description: Default owner namespace for push operations on this remote.

defaultRemote.description: Name of the remote used when no --remote flag is specified.
